---
title: "Example"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-27"
---

# Move the folder "moveme" out of the "example" folder and keep it elsewhere

# Setup
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)
```

```{r Packages}
if (!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman")

pacman::p_load(gt, lmerTest, data.table, tidyverse, ggrepel, here, modelsummary, fs, broom.mixed)
```

```{r helper functions}
# helper that writes your generated results into .tex docs (estimate = x; sd = y; p = z)
  write_tex <- function(filename, text) {
    writeLines(text, con = path(res_dir, filename))
  }


# helpers to get results into proper format
  fmt_num <- function(x, digits = 2) {
    formatC(x, format = "f", digits = digits)
  }

  fmt_p <- function(p) {
    if (is.na(p)) return("NA")
    if (p < 0.001) return("p < 0.001")
    paste0("$p = ", formatC(p, format = "f", digits = 3), "$")
  }

  fmt_beta_se_p <- function(beta, se, p, digits = 2) {
    paste0(
      "$(\\beta = ", fmt_num(beta, digits),
      ",\\ \\mathrm{SE} = ", fmt_num(se, digits),
      ",\\ ", fmt_p(p), ")$"
    )
  }
  
  format_p_stars <- function(p) {
  stars <- case_when(
    p < 0.001 ~ "***",
    p < 0.01  ~ "**",
    p < 0.05  ~ "*",
    TRUE ~ ""
  )
      p_lab <- case_when(
        p < 0.001 ~ "<0.001",
        TRUE ~ sprintf("%.3f", p)
      )
      
      paste0(p_lab, stars)
    }
  
  fmt_ci <- function(low, high, digits = 2) {
  paste0("[", fmt_num(low, digits), ",\\ ", fmt_num(high, digits), "]")
  }

  latex_f <- function(f, df1, df2, p, digits = 2) {
    paste0(
      "$F(",
      formatC(df1, format = "f", digits = 1), ",\\ ",
      formatC(df2, format = "f", digits = 1), ") = ",
      formatC(f, format = "f", digits = digits), ",\\ ",
      if (p < 0.001) "$p < 0.001$" else paste0("$p = ", formatC(p, format
      = "f", digits = 3), "$")
    )
  }

  latex_term <- function(model, term, digits = 2) {
    coefs <- summary(model)$coefficients
  
    beta <- coefs[term, "Estimate"]
    se   <- coefs[term, "Std. Error"]
    p    <- coefs[term, "Pr(>|t|)"]
  
    paste0(
      "$(\\beta = ", formatC(beta, format = "f", digits = digits),
      ",\\ \\mathrm{SE} = ", formatC(se, format = "f", digits = digits),
      ",\\ ",
      if (p < 0.001) "$p < 0.001$" else paste0("$p = ", formatC(p, format
      = "f", digits = 3), "$"), ")$"
    )
  }


# creates model tables 
make_model_gt <- function(model,
                          coef_map,
                          title_text = "",
                          source_note_text = "",
                          estimate_label = md("&beta;")) {

    tab_df <- tidy(model, effects = "fixed") %>%
      mutate(
        sig = p.value < 0.05,
        `p value` = format_p_stars(p.value),
        Term = recode(term, !!!coef_map)
      ) %>%
      transmute(
        Term,
        Estimate = estimate,
        `Std. Error` = std.error,
        df = df,
        `t value` = statistic,
        `p value`,
        sig
      )
  
    gt_tbl <- tab_df %>%
      gt() %>%
      fmt_number(
        columns = c(Estimate, `Std. Error`, df, `t value`),
        decimals = 2
      ) %>%
      cols_label(
        Term = "Term",
        Estimate = estimate_label,
        `Std. Error` = "SE",
        df = "df",
        `t value` = "t",
        `p value` = "p"
      ) %>%
      cols_align(
        align = "left",
        columns = Term
      ) %>%
      cols_align(
        align = "right",
        columns = c(Estimate, `Std. Error`, df, `t value`, `p value`)
      ) %>%
      cols_width(
        Term ~ px(170),
        Estimate ~ px(55),
        `Std. Error` ~ px(55),
        df ~ px(60),
        `t value` ~ px(55),
        `p value` ~ px(65)
      ) %>%
      tab_style(
        style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
        locations = cells_body(columns = `p value`, rows = sig)
      ) %>%
      cols_hide(columns = sig) %>%
      tab_options(
        table.width = px(520),
        container.width = px(520),
        table.font.size = px(10.5),
        data_row.padding = px(1),
        column_labels.padding = px(1),
        column_labels.font.weight = "bold"
      )
  
    if (nzchar(title_text)) {
      gt_tbl <- gt_tbl %>%
        tab_header(title = md(glue("**{title_text}**")))
    }
  
    if (nzchar(source_note_text)) {
      gt_tbl <- gt_tbl %>%
        tab_source_note(source_note = md(source_note_text))
    }
  
    gt_tbl
  }
```

# Create Directories
```{r directories}
# i run this from an RProject so my root directory is my RProject folder with all my subfolders and files in it. Then i create a 'dissertation' folder that contains only the files i need for latex


# this is where you keep all of your generated results and latex documents (.tex), figures, tables, and zotero references.bib 
  diss_dir <- path_expand("~/Documents/example")

# subdirectories to keep everything organized
  fig_dir <- path(diss_dir, "figures")
  tab_dir <- path(diss_dir, "tables")
  res_dir <- path(diss_dir, "results")

# for supplementary figures and tables
  supp_fig_dir <- path(fig_dir, "supp")
  supp_tab_dir <- path(tab_dir, "supp")

# create directories if they don't exist
  dir_create(diss_dir, recurse = TRUE)
  dir_create(fig_dir, recurse = TRUE)
  dir_create(tab_dir, recurse = TRUE)
  dir_create(res_dir, recurse = TRUE)
  dir_create(supp_fig_dir, recurse = TRUE)
  dir_create(supp_tab_dir, recurse = TRUE)
```  

# Load Data
```{r data}
# check here() to find your current directory
# assumes you have a folder in the root directory called 'data' with a file called example.csv inside that folder
here()
df_example <- fread(file.path(diss_dir, "moveme", "example.csv"))
```

# Figure & Table outputs
```{r model}
model <- lmer(
  chromatic_intensity ~ rank_prop * ageClass + season + group + (1 | id),
  data = df_example
)

model_anova <- anova(model)
model_anova
```

```{r generate results}
# name your variables nicely
names(fixef(model))
coef_map <- c(
  "(Intercept)" = "Intercept",
  "ageClasssenior" = "Senior (vs adult)",
  "seasonnonconceptive" = "Non-conceptive season",
  "group" = "Group 7 (vs group 1)",
  "rank_prop" = "Rank",
  "rank_prop:ageClasssenior" = "Rank x age class"
)

# Extract rows from your model, just pulling season as an example
season_row     <- model_anova["season", ]

# put results in latex format
season_f <- latex_f(
  f   = as.numeric(season_row["F value"]),
  df1 = as.numeric(season_row["NumDF"]),
  df2 = as.numeric(season_row["DenDF"]),
  p   = as.numeric(season_row["Pr(>F)"])
)

# generate .tex file that can be input directly into your latex document
write_tex("season_f.tex", season_f)
```

```{r tidying}
# some tidying specific to the example dataframe 
age_ns <- df_example %>%
  count(ageClass)

age_labels <- setNames(
  paste0(age_ns$ageClass, "\n(n=", age_ns$n, ")"),
  age_ns$ageClass
)
```

```{r table}
example_table <- make_model_gt(
  model = model,
  coef_map = coef_map,
  title_text = "",
  source_note_text = "Significance codes: *** p < 0.001, ** p < 0.01, * p < 0.05.*"
)

example_table 

gtsave(example_table, file.path(tab_dir, "table_1.png"))
```

```{r figure}
example_figure <- ggplot(df_example, aes(ageClass, chromatic_intensity)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = ageClass),
              width = 0.12,
              alpha = 0.7,
              size = 3) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean,
               geom = "point",
               size = 4,
               color = "black") +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_cl_boot,
               geom = "errorbar",
               width = 0.18,
               color = "black") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = age_labels) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    x = "Age class",
    y = "Chromatic intensity"
  ) +
  guides(color = "none")

example_figure

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(fig_dir, "figure_1.png"),
  plot = example_figure,
  width = 6.5,
  height = 4.5,
  dpi = 800,
)
```
